title: Direct object pronouns: lo, la, los, las
objectives: Place pronouns correctly before conjugated verbs
grammar_notes: Direct object pronouns go BEFORE the conjugated verb: '¿Tienes el libro?' → '¿Lo tienes?'
With infinitives or gerunds you can attach them: 'Quiero verlo' / 'Lo quiero ver' — both correct.
Russian uses case endings on the noun (книгу) — Spanish uses pronouns. The information is the same; the mechanism differs.
example_phrases: Necesito los papeles. — Los tengo aquí.
